hibernate-mapping.query: Select distinct(ft) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction ft, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PostingRule as rule where ft.Company = :company and ft.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd = 'Created' and ft.PayrollRun.SourcePayRunId = :sourcePayrollRunId and rule.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd = ft.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd and rule.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd in ('Executed', 'Completed') and rule.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = :ledgerAccountCode and rule.CreditDebitInd = :creditDebitInd

Select distinct(ft) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction ft, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PostingRule as rule where ft.Company = :company and ft.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd = 'Created' and ft.PayrollRun.SourcePayRunId = :sourcePayrollRunId and rule.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd = ft.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd and rule.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd in ('Executed', 'Completed') and rule.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = :ledgerAccountCode and rule.CreditDebitInd = :creditDebitInd and 'Tax' = all elements(ft.TransactionType.ServiceSet)

Select distinct(ft) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction ft, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PostingRule as rule where ft.Company = :company and ft.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd = 'Created' and ft.PayrollRun.SourcePayRunId = :sourcePayrollRunId and rule.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd = ft.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd and rule.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd in ('Executed', 'Completed') and rule.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = :ledgerAccountCode and rule.CreditDebitInd = :creditDebitInd and 'Tax' != any elements(ft.TransactionType.ServiceSet)
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select {payrollRun.*}, SUM ( ft.financial_transaction_amount * DECODE (pr.credit_debit_ind, 'C', DECODE (la.balance_calculation_rule,'CreditAddsToBalance', 1,-1), 'D', DECODE (la.balance_calculation_rule,'DebitAddsToBalance', 1,-1) )) as balance from psp_payroll_run payrollRun join psp_financial_transaction ft on ft.payroll_run_fk = payrollRun.payroll_run_seq and ft.company_fk = :company_id join psp_financial_trans_state fts on fts.financial_transaction_fk = ft.financial_transaction_seq and fts.company_fk = :company_id join psp_posting_rule pr on pr.transaction_type_fk = ft.transaction_type_fk and pr.transaction_state_fk = fts.transaction_state_fk join psp_ledger_account la on la.ledger_account_cd = pr.ledger_account_fk where payrollRun.company_fk = :company_id and la.ledger_account_cd = :ledgerAccountCode group by payrollRun.PAYROLL_RUN_SEQ, payrollRun.VERSION, payrollRun.CREATOR_ID, payrollRun.CREATED_DATE, payrollRun.MODIFIER_ID, payrollRun.MODIFIED_DATE, payrollRun.REALM_ID, payrollRun.PAYCHECK_DATE, payrollRun.PAYROLL_NET_AMOUNT, payrollRun.PAYROLL_RUN_DATE, payrollRun.SOURCE_PAY_RUN_ID, payrollRun.STATUS_EFFECTIVE_DATE, payrollRun.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS, payrollRun.PAYCHECK_SETTLEMENT_DATE, payrollRun.PAYROLL_RUN_TYPE, payrollRun.WIRE_EXPECTED_DATE, payrollRun.COLLECTION_STAGE_FK, payrollRun.COMPANY_FK having SUM ( ft.financial_transaction_amount * DECODE (pr.credit_debit_ind, 'C', DECODE (la.balance_calculation_rule,'CreditAddsToBalance', 1,-1), 'D', DECODE (la.balance_calculation_rule,'DebitAddsToBalance', 1,-1) )) > 0

select law.LAW_ID, SUM ( financial_transaction_amount * DECODE ( credit_debit_ind, 'C', DECODE (balance_calculation_rule, 'CreditAddsToBalance', 1, -1), 'D', DECODE (balance_calculation_rule, 'DebitAddsToBalance', 1, -1))) amount, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'YYYY'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'YYYY')) quarteryear, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'Q'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'Q')) quarter FROM PSP_FINANCIAL_TRANSACTION ft JOIN psp_financial_trans_state fts ON fts.financial_transaction_fk = ft.financial_transaction_seq AND fts.TRANSACTION_STATE_EFF_DATE >= TRUNC (ft.CREATED_DATE) - 2 AND TRUNC (fts.TRANSACTION_STATE_EFF_DATE) >= TRUNC (ft.CREATED_DATE) - 2 AND fts.company_fk = :company_fk JOIN PSP_POSTING_RULE pr ON pr.transaction_state_fk = fts.transaction_state_fk AND pr.transaction_type_fk = ft.transaction_type_fk JOIN psp_ledger_account la ON la.ledger_account_cd = pr.ledger_account_fk JOIN PSP_LAW law ON law.law_id = ft.law_fk LEFT JOIN PSP_MONEY_MOVEMENT_TRANSACTION mmt ON mmt.money_movement_transaction_seq = ft.money_movement_transaction_fk AND mmt.company_fk = :company_fk LEFT JOIN psp_payroll_run payroll ON payroll.payroll_run_seq = ft.payroll_run_fk WHERE pr.LEDGER_ACCOUNT_FK = :ledger_account_fk and ft.company_fk = :company_fk and law.payment_template_fk = :payment_template_fk GROUP BY law.law_id, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'YYYY'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'YYYY')), COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'Q'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'Q')) having SUM ( financial_transaction_amount * DECODE ( credit_debit_ind, 'C', DECODE (balance_calculation_rule, 'CreditAddsToBalance', 1, -1), 'D', DECODE (balance_calculation_rule, 'DebitAddsToBalance', 1, -1))) <> 0

select law.LAW_ID, SUM ( financial_transaction_amount * (CASE credit_debit_ind WHEN 'C' THEN (CASE balance_calculation_rule WHEN 'CreditAddsToBalance' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) WHEN 'D' THEN (CASE balance_calculation_rule WHEN 'DebitAddsToBalance' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) END)) amount, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'YYYY'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'YYYY')) quarteryear, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'Q'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'Q')) quarter FROM PSP_FINANCIAL_TRANSACTION ft JOIN psp_financial_trans_state fts ON fts.financial_transaction_fk = ft.financial_transaction_seq AND fts.TRANSACTION_STATE_EFF_DATE >= DATE_TRUNC ('day',ft.CREATED_DATE) - interval '2' day AND DATE_TRUNC ('day',fts.TRANSACTION_STATE_EFF_DATE) >= DATE_TRUNC ('day',ft.CREATED_DATE) - interval '2' day AND fts.company_fk = :company_fk JOIN PSP_POSTING_RULE pr ON pr.transaction_state_fk = fts.transaction_state_fk AND pr.transaction_type_fk = ft.transaction_type_fk JOIN psp_ledger_account la ON la.ledger_account_cd = pr.ledger_account_fk JOIN PSP_LAW law ON law.law_id = ft.law_fk LEFT JOIN PSP_MONEY_MOVEMENT_TRANSACTION mmt ON mmt.money_movement_transaction_seq = ft.money_movement_transaction_fk AND mmt.company_fk = :company_fk LEFT JOIN psp_payroll_run payroll ON payroll.payroll_run_seq = ft.payroll_run_fk WHERE pr.LEDGER_ACCOUNT_FK = :ledger_account_fk and ft.company_fk = :company_fk and law.payment_template_fk = :payment_template_fk GROUP BY law.law_id, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'YYYY'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'YYYY')), COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'Q'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'Q')) having SUM ( financial_transaction_amount * (CASE credit_debit_ind WHEN 'C' THEN (CASE balance_calculation_rule WHEN 'CreditAddsToBalance' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) WHEN 'D' THEN (CASE balance_calculation_rule WHEN 'DebitAddsToBalance' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) END)) <> 0

select law.LAW_ID, SUM ( financial_transaction_amount * DECODE ( credit_debit_ind, 'C', DECODE (balance_calculation_rule, 'CreditAddsToBalance', 1, -1), 'D', DECODE (balance_calculation_rule, 'DebitAddsToBalance', 1, -1))) amount, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'YYYY'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'YYYY')) quarteryear, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'Q'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'Q')) quarter FROM PSP_FINANCIAL_TRANSACTION ft JOIN psp_financial_trans_state fts ON fts.financial_transaction_fk = ft.financial_transaction_seq AND fts.TRANSACTION_STATE_EFF_DATE >= TRUNC (ft.CREATED_DATE) - 2 AND TRUNC (fts.TRANSACTION_STATE_EFF_DATE) >= TRUNC (ft.CREATED_DATE) - 2 AND fts.company_fk = :company_fk JOIN PSP_POSTING_RULE pr ON pr.transaction_state_fk = fts.transaction_state_fk AND pr.transaction_type_fk = ft.transaction_type_fk JOIN psp_ledger_account la ON la.ledger_account_cd = pr.ledger_account_fk JOIN PSP_LAW law ON law.law_id = ft.law_fk LEFT JOIN PSP_MONEY_MOVEMENT_TRANSACTION mmt ON mmt.money_movement_transaction_seq = ft.money_movement_transaction_fk AND mmt.company_fk = :company_fk LEFT JOIN psp_payroll_run payroll ON payroll.payroll_run_seq = ft.payroll_run_fk WHERE pr.LEDGER_ACCOUNT_FK = :ledger_account_fk and ft.company_fk = :company_fk GROUP BY law.law_id, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'YYYY'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'YYYY')), COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'Q'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'Q')) having SUM ( financial_transaction_amount * DECODE ( credit_debit_ind, 'C', DECODE (balance_calculation_rule, 'CreditAddsToBalance', 1, -1), 'D', DECODE (balance_calculation_rule, 'DebitAddsToBalance', 1, -1))) <> 0

select law.LAW_ID, SUM ( financial_transaction_amount * (CASE credit_debit_ind WHEN 'C' THEN (CASE balance_calculation_rule WHEN 'CreditAddsToBalance' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) WHEN 'D' THEN (CASE balance_calculation_rule WHEN 'DebitAddsToBalance' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) END)) amount, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'YYYY'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'YYYY')) quarteryear, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'Q'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'Q')) quarter FROM PSP_FINANCIAL_TRANSACTION ft JOIN psp_financial_trans_state fts ON fts.financial_transaction_fk = ft.financial_transaction_seq AND fts.TRANSACTION_STATE_EFF_DATE >= DATE_TRUNC ('day',ft.CREATED_DATE) - interval '2' day AND DATE_TRUNC ('day',fts.TRANSACTION_STATE_EFF_DATE) >= DATE_TRUNC ('day',ft.CREATED_DATE) - interval '2' day AND fts.company_fk = :company_fk JOIN PSP_POSTING_RULE pr ON pr.transaction_state_fk = fts.transaction_state_fk AND pr.transaction_type_fk = ft.transaction_type_fk JOIN psp_ledger_account la ON la.ledger_account_cd = pr.ledger_account_fk JOIN PSP_LAW law ON law.law_id = ft.law_fk LEFT JOIN PSP_MONEY_MOVEMENT_TRANSACTION mmt ON mmt.money_movement_transaction_seq = ft.money_movement_transaction_fk AND mmt.company_fk = :company_fk LEFT JOIN psp_payroll_run payroll ON payroll.payroll_run_seq = ft.payroll_run_fk WHERE pr.LEDGER_ACCOUNT_FK = :ledger_account_fk and ft.company_fk = :company_fk GROUP BY law.law_id, COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'YYYY'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'YYYY')), COALESCE (TO_CHAR (payroll.paycheck_date, 'Q'), TO_CHAR (mmt.payment_period_end, 'Q')) having SUM ( financial_transaction_amount * (CASE credit_debit_ind WHEN 'C' THEN (CASE balance_calculation_rule WHEN 'CreditAddsToBalance' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) WHEN 'D' THEN (CASE balance_calculation_rule WHEN 'DebitAddsToBalance' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) END)) <> 0
